the_problem: Internal property names in HubSpot cannot be changed after creation. While the display label can be updated at any time, the internal API name remains permanent.
how_it_manifests: Requests to 'rename a custom property' at the API or backend level cannot be fulfilled directly
Renaming requires creating a brand new property, migrating all historical data, updating dependencies (workflows, forms, lists, integration mappings), and archiving the old property
when_to_surface_this: Any time a new custom property is about to be created
During design reviews to confirm that internal naming conventions match technical standards before provisioning
mitigation_options: Verify and confirm internal naming conventions with the consultant prior to creation
Ensure properties are created using carefully considered, finalized internal names
Clearly document that any future internal name change will necessitate a full data and workflow migration process
